original_filename: The case for human_AI interaction as system 0 thinking.pdf

decisions.reason: AUTO: Relevance=HIGH x Quality=HIGH x not a duplicate. Top-tier peer-reviewed Nature Human Behaviour Correspondence proposing a labeled construct (system 0) distinct from existing [[tri-system-theory]] (System 3) framing.

AUTO: HIGH confidence on every classification. 1 source distillation + 1 NEW method (system-0-thinking) + 3 UPDATE proposals (tri-system-theory, cognitive-offloading, cognitive-surrender). Sibling-theory relationship to existing tri-system-theory handled explicitly via UPDATE rather than left implicit.
